Clause (a)Schedule – I of the First Statute shall be substituted as under: “The Director shall be entitled to furnished office cum residential accommodation in the campus of the Institute with a License Fee as per CPWD norms ( or as proposed by Executive Council from time to time)”. 4. Clause (a) of Schedule II of the First Statute may be deleted.
